post_text: i prayed for 5 minutes every morning for 90 days. missed zero. here's what changed: anxiety dropped. decisions got clearer. arguments with my wife went from 3x/week to maybe 1. not because prayer is magic. because 5 minutes of silence before chaos rewires how you respond to everything.
media_description: morning prayer, person in quiet room
cta: try 5 minutes tomorrow morning before you touch your phone
